title: Business Analyst
description:
Key Responsibilities

  • Lead end-to-end business analysis activities across projects and product lifecycles

  • Elicit, analyze, validate, and document business, functional, and non-functional requirements

  • Conduct stakeholder workshops, interviews, and JAD sessions with senior business and technical stakeholders

  • Translate business needs into BRD, FRD, SRS, Use Cases, User Stories, and Acceptance Criteria

  • Act as a bridge between business users, product owners, architects, developers, and QA teams

  • Perform process analysis and optimization using AS-IS / TO-BE modeling

  • Support UAT planning and execution, defect triage, and business sign-off

  • Analyze data trends and KPIs to support business decisions

  • Ensure requirements traceability throughout the SDLC

  • Support change management, impact analysis, and release planning

Business Analysis & Domain Skills

  • Strong expertise in requirements elicitation techniques (interviews, workshops, surveys, prototyping)

  • Advanced knowledge of SDLC, Agile, Scrum, and Waterfall methodologies

  • Experience creating and managing Requirement Traceability Matrix (RTM)

  • Strong understanding of business process re-engineering (BPR)

  • Ability to perform gap analysis, root cause analysis, and impact analysis

  • Experience working in enterprise-scale or multi-vendor projects

Technical & Data Skills

  • Strong hands-on experience with SQL for data validation and analysis

  • Ability to interpret data models, APIs, system flows, and integration diagrams

  • Experience working with ERP / CRM / Core Banking / Insurance / Government / SaaS platforms (any relevant domain)

  • Familiarity with REST APIs, JSON, XML, and system integrations

  • Experience with reporting and analytics tools (Power BI, Tableau, Excel Advanced)

Tools & Documentation

  • Proficiency in JIRA, Confluence, Azure DevOps, or similar ALM tools

  • Experience with BPMN / UML tools (Visio, Draw.io, Lucidchart)

  • Strong documentation skills with MS Word, Excel, PowerPoint

  • Experience writing clear, testable, and unambiguous requirements

Mandatory Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in Business, IT, Computer Science, Engineering, or related field

  • 5+ years of proven experience as a Business Analyst

Preferred / Added Advantage

  • CBAP / CCBA / PMI-PBA certification

  • Experience in regulated industries (Banking, Finance, Healthcare, Government)

  • Experience working with product-based or digital transformation projects

postedCompany.description:
Horizon Global Services is a leading provider of Human Resource (HR) solutions for the education sector. Our journey began with a proposal from the Singapore Teachers’ Union (STU) to the Ministry of Education (MOE), resulting in the Teacher Assistant Scheme. This initiative helped reduce teachers' workloads by assigning administrative tasks to trained Teacher Assistants (TAs), allowing educators to focus more on teaching. The success of this scheme quickly made us a trusted name in educational manpower services.


Today, Horizon Global Services is a key player in Singapore's education sector, serving numerous schools and solidifying our reputation as a top HR solutions provider. Our services have also expanded into various government sectors. We supply manpower to key ministries and organizations, including the Ministry of Home Affairs, Ministry of Health, Ministry of Finance, The State Courts, Singapore Workforce Development Agency, and the Energy Market Authority.


Our dedication to excellence and innovation ensures we meet the needs of our clients across different fields. Horizon Global Services continues to deliver effective HR solutions, making a significant impact in both education and public service sectors.
postedCompany.name: HORIZON GLOBAL SERVICES PTE. LTD.
